init(char[]) - Method in class emiratesid.ae.sm.modules.GenericSecureMessagingModule
Initialize SM module with the specified PIN or password
init(char[]) - Method in class emiratesid.ae.sm.modules.SAMSecureMessagingModule

Initialize SM module with the specified password
InitializeWrapper() - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper
Called internally to initialize the wrapper and load the Dll
inverseY() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.biometrics.FTP_Template
Inverse the Y value of all minutiae Y = 0xFF - Y; this funcion is used to convert ISO template into DINV or a DINV template into an ISO one
Is_UAE_Card(char[]) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.ATRSetting
Detects if the current smart card is UAE card using its ATR
Is_UAE_SAM(char[]) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.ATRSetting
Detects if the current smart card is SAM card using its ATR
Is_UAE_TestCard(char[]) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.ATRSetting
Detects if the current smart card is UAE test card using its ATR
isCardGenuine() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.publicdata.PublicDataFacade
Check if the current smart card is Genuine UAE card This method authenticate the card with local SAM
isCardGenuine(SecureMessagingInterface) - Method in class emiratesid.ae.sm.client.SecureMessagingActions
Check if the current smart card is Genuine UAE card This method authenticate the card with the provided SM module object
isConnected() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.PCSCReader
Check if the card is in CONNECTED status
isImageLoaded() - Method in class emiratesid.ae.biometrics.FTP_Image
Indicates if the image already loaded
ISO_19794 - Static variable in class emiratesid.ae.biometrics.FTP_TemplateType
 
ISO_19794_CS - Static variable in class emiratesid.ae.biometrics.FormatType
 
isSAGEM_SAM_Card(int) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.CardTypeEnum
checks if the card type is SAGEM SAM card
isUAE_ID_Card(int) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.CardTypeEnum
checks if the card type is UAE card
isUAE_ID_TEST_Card(int) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.CardTypeEnum
checks if the card type is UAE test card
isUNKNOWN_Card(int) - Static method in class emiratesid.ae.readersmgt.CardTypeEnum
checks if the card type is unknown to the toolkit
